stories.description: Release Candidate Freeze — git tag, freeze script, evidence bundle (STORY-001)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: freeze-rc.sh exists — `test -f scripts/freeze-rc.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Script creates annotated git tag — `grep -c "git tag" scripts/freeze-rc.sh` returns at least 1
Script captures git SHA — `grep -c "rev-parse" scripts/freeze-rc.sh` returns at least 1
Script references Artifact Registry — `grep -c "docker.pkg.dev\|artifacts docker" scripts/freeze-rc.sh` returns at least 1
Script generates evidence bundle — `grep -c "RC_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE" scripts/freeze-rc.sh` returns at least 1
Script validates clean working tree — `grep -c "git status\|git diff\|porcelain" scripts/freeze-rc.sh` returns at least 1
RC evidence bundle template exists — `test -f docs/deployment/RC_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Evidence bundle references staging evidence — `grep -c "STAGING_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE\|ROLLBACK_DRILL_EVIDENCE\|GO_NO_GO_CHECKLIST" docs/deployment/RC_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE.md` returns at least 3
Syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/freeze-rc-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 6 passing tests
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-001 — `grep -c "STORY-001" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1
provision-production.sh exists — `test -f scripts/provision-production.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Script uses dedicated-core tier — `grep -c "db-custom" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns at least 1
Script does NOT use db-f1-micro — `grep -c "db-f1-micro" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns 0
Script creates loadpilot-prod instance — `grep -c "loadpilot-prod" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns at least 1
Script creates trucklogix_prod database — `grep -c "trucklogix_prod" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns at least 1
Script creates production service account — `grep -c "loadpilot-api-prod-sa" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns at least 1
Script grants secretAccessor role — `grep -c "secretmanager.secretAccessor\|secretAccessor" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns at least 1
Script grants cloudsql.client role — `grep -c "cloudsql.client" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns at least 1
Script enables automated backups — `grep -c "backup\|enable-bin-log" scripts/provision-production.sh` returns at least 1
deploy-production.sh exists — `test -f scripts/deploy-production.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Deploy script uses --no-traffic — `grep -c "no-traffic" scripts/deploy-production.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script sets NODE_ENV=production — `grep -c "NODE_ENV=production" scripts/deploy-production.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script uses min-instances=1 — `grep -c "min-instances=1\|min-instances 1" scripts/deploy-production.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script uses production service account — `grep -c "loadpilot-api-prod-sa" scripts/deploy-production.sh` returns at least 1
.env.production exists — `test -f .env.production && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
.env.production is gitignored — `grep -c ".env.production" .gitignore` returns at least 1
Provisioning syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/provision-production-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 9 passing tests
Deploy syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/deploy-production-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 8 passing tests
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-002 — `grep -c "STORY-002" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1

stories.description: Production Data Protection — backup setup script, PITR config, restore procedure (STORY-003)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: backup-setup.sh exists — `test -f scripts/backup-setup.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Script enables automated backups — `grep -c "instances patch\|backup-start-time" scripts/backup-setup.sh` returns at least 1
Script enables binary logging for PITR — `grep -c "enable-bin-log\|enable_bin_log" scripts/backup-setup.sh` returns at least 1
Script sets transaction log retention — `grep -c "transaction-log-retention\|retained-transaction-log-days" scripts/backup-setup.sh` returns at least 1
Script creates on-demand baseline backup — `grep -c "backups create" scripts/backup-setup.sh` returns at least 1
Script targets production instance — `grep -c "loadpilot-prod" scripts/backup-setup.sh` returns at least 1
Restore procedure exists — `test -f docs/deployment/RESTORE_PROCEDURE.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Restore procedure covers PITR — `grep -c "point-in-time\|PITR\|clone.*--point-in-time" docs/deployment/RESTORE_PROCEDURE.md` returns at least 1
Restore procedure covers full backup restore — `grep -c "backups restore\|restore-backup\|restoreBackup" docs/deployment/RESTORE_PROCEDURE.md` returns at least 1
Data protection policy exists — `test -f docs/deployment/DATA_PROTECTION_POLICY.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Data protection policy documents RPO/RTO — `grep -c "RPO\|RTO" docs/deployment/DATA_PROTECTION_POLICY.md` returns at least 2
Syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/backup-setup-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 6 passing tests
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-003 — `grep -c "STORY-003" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1

stories.description: Controlled Rollout Gate Scripts (A/B/C/D) + Production Migration Script (STORY-005)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: gate-a-internal.sh exists — `test -f scripts/gate-a-internal.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
gate-b-pilot.sh exists — `test -f scripts/gate-b-pilot.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
gate-c-broader.sh exists — `test -f scripts/gate-c-broader.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
gate-d-ga.sh exists — `test -f scripts/gate-d-ga.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Gate A routes 10% traffic — `grep -c "=10\b\|=10%" scripts/gate-a-internal.sh` returns at least 1
Gate B routes 25% traffic — `grep -c "=25\b\|=25%" scripts/gate-b-pilot.sh` returns at least 1
Gate C routes 50% traffic — `grep -c "=50\b\|=50%" scripts/gate-c-broader.sh` returns at least 1
Gate D routes 100% traffic — `grep -c "=100\b\|=100%" scripts/gate-d-ga.sh` returns at least 1
All gate scripts use update-traffic — `for f in scripts/gate-{a-internal,b-pilot,c-broader,d-ga}.sh; do grep -c "update-traffic" "$f"; done | paste -sd+ | bc` returns at least 4

All gate scripts check health after routing — `for f in scripts/gate-{a-internal,b-pilot,c-broader,d-ga}.sh; do grep -c "/api/health\|verify-production\|smoke-test" "$f"; done | paste -sd+ | bc` returns at least 4
All gate scripts support auto-rollback — `for f in scripts/gate-{a-internal,b-pilot,c-broader,d-ga}.sh; do grep -c "AUTO_ROLLBACK\|rollback\|ROLLBACK" "$f"; done | paste -sd+ | bc` returns at least 4
run-production-migrations.sh exists — `test -f scripts/run-production-migrations.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Production migrations target loadpilot-prod — `grep -c "loadpilot-prod" scripts/run-production-migrations.sh` returns at least 1
Production migrations use port 3308 — `grep -c "3308" scripts/run-production-migrations.sh` returns at least 1
Production migrations require DB_PASSWORD_PROD — `grep -c "DB_PASSWORD_PROD" scripts/run-production-migrations.sh` returns at least 1
Rollout evidence template exists — `test -f docs/deployment/ROLLOUT_EVIDENCE.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Rollout evidence covers all 4 gates — `grep -c "Gate A\|Gate B\|Gate C\|Gate D" docs/deployment/ROLLOUT_EVIDENCE.md` returns at least 4
Gate scripts syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/gate-scripts-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 10 passing tests
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-005 — `grep -c "STORY-005" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1
Server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows passing tests with zero failures
Frontend tests pass — `npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows passing tests with zero failures
E2E tests pass — `npx playwright test --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows at least 186 passing tests with zero failures

All 11 production scripts exist — `for f in scripts/freeze-rc.sh scripts/provision-production.sh scripts/deploy-production.sh scripts/backup-setup.sh scripts/smoke-test-production.sh scripts/verify-production.sh scripts/gate-a-internal.sh scripts/gate-b-pilot.sh scripts/gate-c-broader.sh scripts/gate-d-ga.sh scripts/run-production-migrations.sh; do test -f "$f" && echo "1"; done | wc -l | tr -d ' '` returns 11

All 4 new production docs exist — `for f in docs/deployment/RC_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE.md docs/deployment/RESTORE_PROCEDURE.md docs/deployment/DATA_PROTECTION_POLICY.md docs/deployment/DOMAIN_SSL_SETUP.md; do test -f "$f" && echo "1"; done | wc -l | tr -d ' '` returns 4
Production readiness verdict exists — `test -f docs/deployment/PRODUCTION_READINESS_VERDICT.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Verdict document contains GO or NO-GO decision — `grep -c "GO\|NO-GO\|VERDICT" docs/deployment/PRODUCTION_READINESS_VERDICT.md` returns at least 2

Verdict document lists all scripts — `grep -c "freeze-rc\|provision-production\|deploy-production\|backup-setup\|smoke-test-production\|verify-production\|gate-a\|gate-b\|gate-c\|gate-d\|run-production-migrations" docs/deployment/PRODUCTION_READINESS_VERDICT.md` returns at least 10

Go/No-Go checklist updated with production items — `grep -c "dedicated.core\|backup.*PITR\|custom domain\|zero.traffic\|Gate A\|Gate B\|Gate C\|Gate D" docs/deployment/GO_NO_GO_CHECKLIST.md` returns at least 4
Rollout evidence template exists — `test -f docs/deployment/ROLLOUT_EVIDENCE.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"

Verification log completeness — all 6 stories logged — `grep -c "STORY-00[1-6]" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 6
